data.description:
## Why
The code-review example workflow needs commit SHAs attached to a ticket as input; this is a new
durable store surface that must be event-schema-correct.

## What
- New commits-on-ticket event type wired with full rigor: KNOWN_EVENT_TYPES, EVENT_TYPES + error
  list, a processor, compaction preserve-filter, HLC+UUID convergence, compiled-state read-back.
- Reconcile exclusion by NOT surfacing commit SHAs as a Jira-synced field (the outbound differ
  is field-driven).

## Scope
- In: the event type + read surface.
- Out: commit binding for signed validation (epic 8a1c).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] commits-on-ticket event type + processor + compiled-state read-back.
- [ ] Forward-compat + compaction preserve verified; converges by HLC+UUID.
- [ ] Not surfaced as a Jira-synced field (outbound differ unaffected).
data.title: WS-H: commits-on-ticket event type
